scheme_name: Marriage Assistance To Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)
page_title: Marriage Assistance To Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)

details: The scheme “Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala. Under the scheme, the Government of Kerala is providing marriage assistance of ₹30,000/- to differently-abled girls who have completed 18 years of age for their marriage.
benefits: A one-time assistance of ₹30,000/- is provided to the eligible beneficiaries.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Kerala.
The parents of differently abled girls or differently abled girls should be eligible to apply under the scheme.
The girl who intends to be married should have completed 18 years of age.
The combined annual family income should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.

After receiving the financial aid as per these terms and conditions, if the marriage has to be dissolved for any reason and the girl has to marry a second time, the financial aid can be given for the second marriage.

If the applicant with disabilities dies before the marriage of the daughters, the said financial assistance can be given to the eldest member of the family or any other member of the family who is responsible for conducting the marriage.

In case the applicant PWD dies after the marriage of his daughter but before receiving financial assistance, the senior member of the family or the married member or the individual can be given financial assistance on a suitable bond.

offline: Registration Process:
Step 01:
To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant needs to visit
SUNEETHI- Online Service Application Portal
Step 02:
On the home page, click on “One time Registration”
Step 03:
Fill in the details like Name, Email ID & Mobile Number and click on ‘Register’.
Step 04:
The applicant needs to enter the verification code received on the mobile number and click on ‘Verify’.
Step 05:
Now, a form will open to create the new profile, fill in all the mandatory details and click on ‘Register’.
Login/Application Process:
Once the registration process is completed, the applicant should visit
and click on “Citizen Login”.
Enter the user name i.e. Mobile Number and Password and click on “Sign in”.
Now, the applicant needs to update all their details i.e. Personal Information, Contact Details, Identity Cards & Bank Details by clicking on the 'Edit' button.
Once the applicant updated their profile successfully, the schemes will appear on the left side of the screen.
Select the scheme and click on the “Apply Now” button.
Step 06:
Fill in all the mandatory details in the application form and click on the ‘Submit’ button.
Note:

The application should be submitted at least one month before the date fixed for the marriage. But if the bride is from a Muslim community, the date of the marriage after the religious ceremony called Nikah should be considered for determining the period of application.

documents_required: Certificate to prove the age of the girl
Copy of Disability Identification Card (UDID Card) / Disability Medical Certificate
Bank details- Copy of Pass Book

faqs.question: What is the “Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)” Scheme?
faqs.answer: Under the scheme, the government of Kerala is providing marriage assistance of ₹30,000/- to differently-abled girls who have completed 18 years of age for their marriage.

faqs.question: Which department has launched this scheme?
faqs.answer: Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala

faqs.question: Who is eligible to get the benefits under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The differently-abled girl who intends to be married is eligible to get the benefits under the scheme.

faqs.question: Is this scheme only for differently abled women?
faqs.answer: Yes, only the differently abled women are eligible to apply under the scheme.

faqs.question: Is this scheme only for a resident of Kerala State?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant should be a permanent resident of Kerala State.

faqs.question: Will the financial aid be given to the applicant for her second marriage?
faqs.answer: Yes, after receiving the financial aid as per these terms and conditions, if the marriage has to be dissolved for any reason and the girl has to marry a second time, financial aid can be given for the second marriage.

faqs.question: What is the benefit of the scheme?
faqs.answer: Under the scheme, a one-time assistance of ₹30,000/- is provided to the eligible beneficiaries.

faqs.question: Is there any criterion for annual family income?
faqs.answer: The combined annual family income should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.

faqs.question: How can an applicant apply under the scheme?
faqs.answer: To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant should visit the Official Portal- SUNEETHI- Online Service Application Portal. https://suneethi.sjd.kerala.gov.in

faqs.question: In how many days should the applicant submit the application form?
faqs.answer: The application should be submitted at least one month before the date fixed for the marriage. But if the bride is from a Muslim community, the date of the marriage after the religious ceremony called Nikah should be considered for determining the period of application.
